name: RSI + VWAP Mean Reversion
author: @0x_Discover

long: Enter at open of next candle
short: Enter at open of next candle

exit_rules.take_profit: RSI returns to 50 OR price crosses back through VWAP
exit_rules.stop_loss: Above trigger candle high (shorts) / below trigger candle low (longs)
exit_rules.time_exit: 8 candles with no exit condition met

risk_rules: Do NOT trade during FOMC, CPI, earnings
Works best on: BTC, ETH, SPY, ES, major Forex
red_flags: Price on same side of VWAP for 10+ candles (trending — skip)
RSI stuck above 70 for extended period (strong trend, not exhaustion)

RSI+VWAP Bear Q1-25.error: Replay start failed: Replay failed to start. The selected date may not have data for this timeframe. Try a more recent date or a higher timeframe (e.g., Daily).

RSI+VWAP Bull Q4-24.error: Replay start failed: Replay failed to start. The selected date may not have data for this timeframe. Try a more recent date or a higher timeframe (e.g., Daily).

_recommendations: BTC 1H: Very few trades — try longer timeframe or wider date range for more data
ETH 1H: Very few trades — try longer timeframe or wider date range for more data
ETH 1H: Win rate below 40% — consider tightening entries or widening TP
ETH 1H: Profit factor below 1 — strategy loses money. Review exit logic
